ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Draft round the player was picked */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the player */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Player's social media handle */,
  "status" TEXT /* Player's status (active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the team */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team colors */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team logo */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won */,
  "founded_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who founded the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league during the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  "number_of_playoff_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the playoffs */,
  "mvp" INTEGER /* ID of the MVP of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., guaranteed, non-guaranteed) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., active, expired, option) */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  "bonus_clauses" TEXT /* Details of any bonus clauses */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (active, expired, option) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., ankle sprain, knee injury) */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., out, day-to-day, questionable) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date from the injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (minor, major) */,
  "previous_injuries" INTEGER /* Number of previous injuries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainings" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "training_type" TEXT /* Type of training (e.g., strength, conditioning, skills) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the training session */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "training_goals" TEXT /* Goals of the training session */,
  "training_outcomes" TEXT /* Outcomes of the training session */,
  "attendance" TEXT /* Player's attendance (present, absent) */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the player in the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainings_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the trainer belongs to */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., strength, conditioning, injury recovery) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the trainer */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Trainer's certification */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, manager, analyst, player) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., email notifications) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "accessed_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being accessed */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity being accessed (e.g., player, team, contract, injury) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of team performance statistics */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Total points allowed */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Average steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Average blocks per game */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Average turnovers per game */,
  "personal_fouls_per_game" REAL /* Average personal fouls per game */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the team */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the team */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of home wins */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Number of home losses */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of away wins */,
  "away_losses" INTEGER /* Number of away losses */,
  "playoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of playoff wins */,
  "playoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of playoff losses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)
